reason: The mockup is exceptionally coherent, organized, and directly satisfies the brief for an AI interface to configure system prompts and rules. It groups related elements logically via Gestalt principles and maintains a very clean layout well within Miller's Law limits.
concerns: The contrast ratio of text-on-secondary-container (#57657a) on secondary-container (#d5e3fc) in the Logic Flow Diagram is approximately 3.8:1, which falls below the WCAG 2.1 AA requirement of 4.5:1 for standard text.
The 'New Rule' button has an active touch height below the recommended 44x44px target, violating Fitts's Law on touch screens.
The info symbol in the System Prompt section acts as a visual anchor but lacks a designated placeholder or indicator for a hover-triggered tooltip.
